programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a house burns to the ground and a woman's charred remains are found, investigators must determine whether it was an accident or arson.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An ammunition box and fluorescent fibers reveal the betrayal that led to the murder of a millionaire's family.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: A man is found strangled and burned in his San Antonio apartment and the killer thinks he has destroyed all the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A squashed tomato and a pinpoint reflection of light in a photo help catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An ATM transaction allows Texas detectives to pinpoint a suspect in the slaying of a teacher, but a shoelace stolen from the victim's home proves to be the tie that binds her killer to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Ten years after the murder of a rock singer, forensic scientists use evidence collected to finally bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Leslie Gordon hopes that a vacation with her man will bring them closer together, but he lets her in on a devilish plan, turning her dream getaway into a nightmare; Erica Sheppard runs away from an abusive relationship with her ex.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Teenage mother Ashley Owens struggles to make ends meet until she falls for a bad boy who has a plan to get some easy cash; Nicole Eason dreams of giving her husband a family and uses deceit to fill their home with children.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: When the bodies of a missing couple surface in the waters around New Orleans, detectives wonder who could have committed such a heinous crime.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Kim "tosses her cookies" on Professor Murphy when she tries to dissect her first cadaver; Dwayne hosts a party while Whitley is out of town.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Whitley tries to convince Dwayne to invest in an expensive painting, then loses her job; Ron and Kim reach a crossroads.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: In Dwayne's dream, Whitley is running for president against other women.

programme.title: A Different World
programme.desc: Whitley phones "The Montel Williams Show" for marital advice, not realizing everyone at school is listening in.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Pam's boyfriend begins to pressure her about having a more physical relationship.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: As Pam's romance intensifies, she gets practical advice from Cliff and wise counsel from Clair.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Rudy is not too excited about Clair's planned "women's day.".

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Denise and Martin's search for an apartment leads to a cramped trailer.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: A neighbor (Ray DeMattis) enlists Cliff's help in father-son bonding; Pam (Erika Alexander) meets a prospective beau.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Clair is treated like an old woman after the children discover she is beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: The Huxtable men try to watch a championship football game while helping friends move.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: All that stands between Theo and the dean's list is one more final -- and his dream woman (Vanessa Williams).

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Pam's (Erika Alexander) friends are upset when her good report card reflects attention to her studies; Cliff prepares for the moment when Pam will ask him for a loan.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Theo's special dinner for his girlfriend (Julie Satterfield) is derailed by a variety of visitors.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: A father-to-be (John Ritter) misuses his basketball coaching skills when he coaches his wife (Amy Yasbeck) through labor.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Things go bump in the night for Rudy the first time she baby-sits Olivia; Cliff and his friend decide to ditch their wives and become partners for the annual pinochle tournament.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Cliff and Clair's 27th wedding anniversary is approaching and he has great plans for the celebration.

programme.title: The Cosby Show
programme.desc: Clair recalls old times with high-school friend Kris (Leslie Uggams); Rudy tries to arrange her first date.

programme.title: La reina del flow
programme.desc: Yeimy Montoya paga una injusta condena en Nueva York tras haber sido engañada por el hombre que amaba. Por lo tanto, hace un pacto con las autoridades judiciales para capturar al hombre que asesinó a su familia.

programme.title: Pantanal
programme.desc: José Leôncio, hacendado del Pantanal, deja a una joven embarazada en una visita a Río de Janeiro. Ella va a vivir con él al Pantanal, pero es infeliz y decide volver a la ciudad con su hijo. Veinte años después, este va en busca de su padre.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: Destinos cruzados
programme.desc: Toprak despierta de un coma tras cinco años sin recordar nada de su pasado, y regresa a una familia que no reconoce, incluida su prometida de toda la vida y un niño que vive con él. Sin embargo, su amnesia lo mantiene en una incertidumbre constante.

programme.title: La luz de mi vida
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de su esposo Hakan, Elif descubre que él llevaba una doble vida y tenía una hija con una mujer llamada Firat.

programme.title: Bajo el mismo cielo
programme.desc: La historia de Carlos Martínez, un padre mexicano indocumentado que vive en Los Ángeles, un hombre trabajador y honrado que lucha para darle una mejor vida a sus dos hijos Luis y Rodrigo, pero su mayor temor es ser deportado y perder a su familia.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie returns to cooking the food he loves the most, getting right to heart of the Italian kitchen.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie tracks down some fast, fresh and easy recipes, featuring tasty minty pea tortiglioni and gnocchi with roasted tomato sauce and rocket pesto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie is high up in the Italian Alps cooking some great comfort food, including dumplings, mind-blowing macaroni cheese, and a classic red wine and sausage risotto.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie heads for one of the hottest food destinations in Italy, making hand-crafted pasta, a special seafood stew, and the region's answer to paella.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks Italy
programme.desc: Jamie visits Basilicata in search of some old school Italian recipes and meets a family of shepherds and an 89-year-old macaroni master.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie's soaking up inspiration in Spain with tapas, flavor-charged rice dishes, and spectacular seafood. He cooks a stunning pork chop with peppers and alioli and a surf and turf skewer of prawns, mushrooms, and local ham.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Greece, to the island of Skopelos, starting on the mainland in Thessaloniki. Inspired by meze plates and traditional island cuisine he cooks up a smoky aubergine flatbread and a lemony chargrilled chicken with tzatziki and rice.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver Cooks the Mediterranean
programme.desc: Jamie heads to Marseille in the south of France. Inspired by their stunning seafood, the traditional flavors of Provence, and the multicultural dishes being served up there, he cooks up a steak with a twist and a sublime courgette and olive tart.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Portugal, in the Douro River Valley, a steam locomotive and a small historic train will take you in turn to the water's edge, on the only railroad line in the world that crosses three World Heritage Sites classified by UNESCO.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Cinque Terre Express runs along Italy's northern coast east of Genoa; passing through five UNESCO-listed villages, it offers coastal views and access to cobbled streets, harbors, terraced vineyards and pastel-colored houses.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: Andalusia, now crossed by high-speed and modernized rail lines, unveils its rich culture and landscapes; along the journey, we visit cities like Seville, Granada with its famed Alhambra and Guadix near the Tabernas desert.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: In Greece, the Intercity Express travels from Thessaloniki to Athens, passing sites like the Meteora peaks, Delphi ruins and the Acropolis; the journey continues to the Peloponnese on Greece's last cogwheel train.

programme.title: Europe's Greatest Train Journeys
programme.desc: The Little Yellow Train winds through the Eastern Pyrenees, crossing the Cerdan plateau, the historic Gisclard railway suspension bridge and the Grandes Canalettes caves, known as the underground Versailles of the Pyrenees.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines, where he indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the "King of Street Food".

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: In Kuala Lumpur, Luke meets the famous Mr Hung with a reputation for flying instant noodles and Mr Sou who cooks a hearty Pork Bone Soup with medicinal herbal properties.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food adventure exploring Jakarta, a melting pot of diverse cultural cuisines, where he indulges in an Indonesian dessert, the sweet Martabak, known as the "King of Street Food".

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Street Food Asia
programme.desc: Luke continues his street food journey in Bangkok where he searches for the best Tom Yum soup and entertains the locals with a rare Thai delicacy.

programme.title: The Pizza City You've Never Heard Of
programme.desc: Disturbed by the fact that his hometown of Windsor, Ontario is typically overlooked on lists of the top pizza cities in the world, George Kalivas goes on a mission to set the record straight about where to find the best pies on the planet.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke searches to find Ho Chi Minh's old markets before they disappear due to District 1's rapid development. Join Luke as he gathers fresh ingredients from a local market, tries some traditional delicacies, and follows his sweet tooth to Marou.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's next stop is the destination of Dalat. Follow Luke as he visits the Art Deco Dalat Train Station, experiences the French influence of the region with a Father and Son chef duo, and discovers why Dalat is known as the'Land Of Eternal Spring!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke hops on the train in Ga Thap Cham, and finds himself in Nha Trang- a region of Vietnam with a similar vibe to the French Riviera! Luke hand-catches seafood, looks for some fresh durian fruit, and visits a barramundi farm to harvest sea grapes!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke is in the town of Hoi An. He visits a family who has been making chilli sauce for 5 generations, stops by the Historic Japanese Covered Bridge built in 1719, and meets a 4th generation blacksmith who is creating knives from bomb shells.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: On this stop of his Vietnam journey, Luke visits the bustling seaside city of Da Nang. Join him as he visits the spectacular Dragon Bridge, looks up some succulent shimp on the beach, and stumbles upon a tiny fishing village packed with restaurants.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke visits Huê- famous for its heritage and cuisine and Con Hen Village to learn a technique for de-shelling baby clams, searches for best bowl of spicy beef noodle soup, and stops by a business where they they make turmeric vermicelli noodle salad!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: After a long trip from Hue, Luke finally gets some rest in the scenic Ninh Bihn. Tag along as Luke meets with a local rice farmer, takes a canoe out for some crab hunting, and ventures deep into the jungle in search of a local delicacy- red ant eggs!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke is in northern Vietnam- Hai Phong! This is the birthplace of his partner Lynne. Join Luke as he meets some of Lynne's family for the first time, and tries the delcious Banh Da Noodle- a tasty dish that Hai Phong is renowned for!

programme.title: The Pizza City You've Never Heard Of

programme.desc: After a long trip from Hue, Luke finally gets some rest in the scenic Ninh Bihn. Tag along as Luke meets with a local rice farmer, takes a canoe out for some crab hunting, and ventures deep into the jungle in search of a local delicacy- red ant eggs!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke is in northern Vietnam- Hai Phong! This is the birthplace of his partner Lynne. Join Luke as he meets some of Lynne's family for the first time, and tries the delcious Banh Da Noodle- a tasty dish that Hai Phong is renowned for!

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Luke's penultimate stop on his train journey is Hanoi. Follow Luke on his hunt for an iconic Hanoi dish, Bun Cha. Luke takes a ride on the Reunification Express railway, and visits the famous Hoan Kiem Lake for some delcious magenta sticky rice.

programme.title: Luke Nguyen's Railway Vietnam
programme.desc: Nearing the end of his Vitenamese journey, Luke stops in Sapa, a hilltop region that he remembers from his travels fifteen years ago. Join Luke as he rekindles a friendship from his previous visit and learns about a local dish of dried buffalo.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred start their road trip in Gino's homeland of Italy, where Gino needs help to pull off an event that is close to his heart. Gino collects Gordon and Fred in a campervan to begin a road trip they won't be forgetting in a hurry.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to France, where Fred has been asked to co-host an Oyster Festival in the beautiful Arcachon Bay, in just four days' time. Reunited with their campervan, Fred nominates himself as the driver in his homeland.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The trio heads to Scotland as Gordon prepares to cook a feast for the chief of Clan Ramsay and his friends. Gordon shows the others how to dress like real Scotsmen as they go in search of Scottish beef, hunt for scallops and play some Highland Games.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon, Gino and Fred travel to Greece to immerse themselves in the culinary traditions. The taste buddies go island-hopping, keen to learn more about the Mediterranean diet and how the country has one of the healthiest populations in the world.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: The boys are in the Greek capital Athens in a vintage VW campervan. This is where high-concept cuisine originated & is still being re-invented, in a city known as the birth place of democracy and the cradle of western civilisation.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: On a mission to taste the worlds best breakfast, the three big egos Gordon, Gino and Fred are venturing out of their comfort zones crossing over the USA boarder into Mexico. They hope to stay out of trouble as they drive their bad boy transporter.

programme.title: Gordon Ramsay's Road Trip
programme.desc: Gordon wants to show Fred & Gino that the food and fresh produce are off the charts! In Las Vegas they indulge in one of the most expensive beef burgers. After a night at the casino they're on the road again to experience the real wild west.

programme.desc: Malcolm enlists Grace to help him win back Karen's affections; Will's flirtation at work lands him in an ethical dilemma; Jack's passion for performing is reignited by a chance encounter with Zusanna, the sister of his former acting teacher.

programme.desc: Will gives local newscaster McCoy Whitman a second chance -- with Jack's help; Grace's campaign hits a snag when the deciding vote belongs to her nemesis Val; campaign manager Karen attempts to secure the winning vote by any means necessary.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack's insistence that Will be nicer to Estefan backfires; Grace unknowingly knocks over a prominent figure; when Karen discovers Noah plans to kill off the main character of her favorite romance novel, she forces him to rewrite the story.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: After her dad, Martin, is rushed to the hospital, Grace is shocked when he refuses a transfusion of Will's blood; Will's mom, Marilyn, uncharacteristically takes Martin to task; Karen's demands cause Jack to uninvite her to his wedding.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When both of their boyfriends ask to move in, Will and Grace use each other as an excuse to get out of it; a snowstorm traps Karen at the office and Jack in an elevator, where he reunites with old flame Drew and tests his commitment to monogamy.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack realizes he lost 13 gold coins he's supposed to give Estefan at their wedding to avoid a curse; Will is concerned that Grace is the only one compromising in her relationship with Noah; Karen shows up at a dinner party with her new date, Nikki.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Estefan's wedding takes a detour when they're forced to get married at the airport by their friend Miss Coco; Will's worried his relationship may turn long-distance; Grace meets a charming guy; Karen reconsiders her commitment to Nikki.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace returns from her European travels a new woman, but her elation is short-lived when she receives life-changing news; Karen teaches Will how to be better at phone sex; Jack has a yard sale to discreetly get rid of Estefan's annoying cuckoo clock.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Grace admits she's not sure who's the father of her baby, Karen orchestrates a "Mamma Mia" situation with the potential baby daddies; Will worries what will happen if he has a straight son and enlists Jack to help him prepare.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will discovers a way to finally get back at Jack for years of mocking his hairline; Grace is determined to prove to Mrs. Timmer she's strong enough to handle being a single mother; Karen squares off against Stan's brother in a poker game.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace get competitive over whose process of having a baby is more difficult; Jack helps Karen prove that she'll be a competent owner of her new baseball team, but Karen realizes that an old acquaintance may be the help she really needs.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Will and McCoy breaking up, Grace and Jack hire the Grief Panda to help Will process his pain; with Karen completely occupied with her new baseball team, Grace believes that she has to fire Karen to set her free.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Committed to becoming a father on his own, Will meets a potential surrogate who has stellar reviews, but her lifestyle choices give him doubts; Grace pretends to be a former famous Annie to gain entrance into AnnieCon.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace and her neighbor give their romance another shot; however, an embarrassing incident puts Grace's relationship, and her dignity, in jeopardy; Will decides it's time for Jack to grow up and cuts him off financially.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Larry warns Will and Grace about the difficult entry process into the elite school they want their kids to go to, they set out to prove that their child would be the better candidate; Jack creates problems between Karen and her booty buddy.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace decide to intervene when they discover Grace's niece is dating a bisexual man; Jack gets permission from his husband to sleep with his celebrity hall pass; Karen struggles to adapt when her assistant books them on an economy flight.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Marilyn goes behind Grace's back to fix her up with a beagle-breeding couple interested in adopting Grace's baby; Will helps Karen deal with a PR nightmare; Jack and Estefan go to extreme lengths to get rid of a mouse.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace and her neighbor, James, give their relationship one more shot, but when James invites Grace to his job at the aquarium, she endangers his job and a species; Jack takes Will to an unexpected place to blow off steam -- church.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen introduces Will and Grace to the new love of her life, Phil, but Will and Grace become suspicious that he has sinister intentions; when Miss Coco Peru tells Jack that he's closing down his bar, Estefan encourages Jack to become its new owner.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace race to save Karen when they think she is in danger after her new boyfriend takes her to a cabin in the woods; Jack makes up a story to a snobby reporter to keep his new bar relevant after its previous owner steps down.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack helps Karen sneak into the manse to retrieve her ring, but they're shocked to find it on the hand of Stan's new girlfriend; while hosting Will's surrogate for the weekend, Will and Grace become the old folks they swore they'd never become.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will ropes Dr. DiLorenzo into going on a fake date so he can spy on his surrogate; Grace struggles with popping her gender reveal balloon; Karen is torn between celebrating her team's championship and helping Jack with his Broadway audition.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will claims living with Grace is like Ricky living with Lucy; when Karen and Jack hear this, they each claim that they are the Lucy of the group; Grace, Karen and Jack each imagine themselves as Lucy, with Will as the Ricky to all of them.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Karen celebrates her baseball team's championship; Will and Grace go to an open house, which leads to a conversation about their future living arrangement; Jack has to decide if he wants to stay in the city to pursue his dreams.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will is determined to not reminisce about his life in the city or his ex; Grace has false alarms of going into labor; Karen attempts to get closure with her ex-husband; Jack's dream of taking a bow on a Broadway stage becomes a very real possibility.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Grace (Debra Messing) gets a marriage proposal, Will (Eric McCormack) risks their friendship by telling her what he thinks.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will mulls asking Grace to share his place when she considers renting across town.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will (Eric McCormack) faces the big issues when Grace (Debra Messing) moves in and wants to knock down the bathroom walls.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace's (Debra Messing) decorating job on Harlin's (Gary Grubbs) place embarrasses Will (Eric McCormack), who then makes an even bigger mess.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Karen (Sean Hayes, Megan Mullally) head out to party, while Will and Grace (Eric McCormack, Debra Messing) go trick-or-treating with Harlan's (Gary Grubbs) kids.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace worries that Will is keeping secrets from her after Jack discloses Will's past affair with a client.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) blames Will (Eric McCormack) for her lack of a social life and decides that they can no longer have fun.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) seeks Will's (Eric McCormack) advice on buying a studio, then sets out to prove she can make the deal.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will (Eric McCormack) develops a dog obsession after Grace (Debra Messing) brings home a puppy, forcing her to take action.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace (Eric McCormack, Debra Messing) eavesdrop on the couple downstairs (guest stars Tom Sullivan, Corinne Bohrer), who are involved in a marital conflict.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack and Grace (Sean Hayes, Debra Messing) surprise Will (Eric McCormack) on his birthday with tickets to an ice-skating show with Rudy Galindo (as himself). With Megan Mullally.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will hires a cleaning lady to help Grace with her preparations for an upcoming decorators' contest; Jack dates a guy he meets at the bookstore.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) gets a visit from her mother (guest star Debbie Reynolds), who wreaks havoc by suggesting that she marry Will (Eric McCormack).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's estranged, older brother turns up at Jack's birthday party; Karen flashes her platinum card for Jack.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) tells Will (Eric McCormack) about her romance with his brother (guest star John Slattery); Karen (Megan Mullally) helps Jack (Sean Hayes) deal with turning 30.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace (Eric McCormack, Debra Messing) compete for the affections of their new neighbor (guest star David Newsom). With Megan Mullally.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) romances an old flame (guest star David Sutcliffe) while in Vermont and tries to hide the fling from Will (Eric McCormack). Tom Bosley also guest stars.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will uses his new neighbor, Val, for his plans while Grace works; Jack is sentenced to pick up trash.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will learns a lesson about prejudice from Jack; Karen tells Grace about her rocky marriage.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A successful publicist hires Grace to decorate his office with the condition that Will dates him.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tones down her competitiveness during game playing, while Will's focus changes to winning; Karen saves a workman.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace and Will (Debra Messing, Eric McCormack) rethink their living arrangement; Jack (Sean Hayes) agrees to marry Karen's (Megan Mullally) maid (guest star Shelley Morrison).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: To assert her independence, Grace moves to the apartment across the hall and throws a dinner party without Will's help.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A jealous Grace runs against Will for president of the board of tenants when she finds out about the position's perks.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace tries to live up to her new "dimensions" when a deceiving, but flattering, picture of her appears in a newspaper.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace's mom (guest star Debbie Reynolds) shows Will (Eric McCormack) a little too much attention for her jealous daughter's taste. With Debra Messing.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will lets his ego get the better of him when he dismisses the clients who believed in him before he became a success.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack (Sean Hayes) challenges Will (Eric McCormack) to become a waiter on his staff; Grace (Debra Messing) finds out a dirty secret about Karen (Megan Mullally).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Jack's (Sean Hayes) mother (guest star Veronica Cartwright) doesn't know he is gay and thinks he once had a romantic relationship with Grace (Debra Messing).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) looks to Will (Eric McCormack) for representation when a lawyer (guest star Gregory Hines) doesn't pay her for a consulting assignment.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Rob and Ellen become jealous when Will and Grace begin to pal around with a photographer and an art gallery manager.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will has until Friday to find a new client or lose his job; Jack and Grace try to get on their favorite TV show.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) is upset when Will's (Eric McCormack) best friend (guest star Megyn Price) from high school wants him to be the father of her baby.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will suffers from strange dreams when he learns that Grace is dating his therapist; Jack and Karen argue about the treatment of Rosario.

programme.desc: Will's father (Sydney Pollack) dissuades him from attending a company banquet because he has told people that Will is married to Grace.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When a kiss between two gay men scheduled to air on TV doesn't happen, Will and Jack go to the network to complain and have an unexpected meeting with the "Today" show's Al Roker.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will (Eric McCormack) gets advice from Jack (Sean Hayes) on how to handle a blind date arranged by his boss (guest star Gregory Hines).

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will's (Eric McCormack) former boyfriend (guest star Chris Potter) is back in town and may want to rekindle their relationship. With Debra Messing.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: After Karen's husband suffers a heart attack, there is speculation on whom she will turn to for support.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace (Debra Messing) backs out of a charity commitment after she has already convinced Will (Eric McCormack) to participate.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Ellen and Rob announce their engagement, Grace confesses to Will that she once had an affair with Rob.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace befriends her kleptomaniac neighbor; Jack crashes a party for former homosexuals to sway a recent convert back to the gay life.

programme.desc: Will and Grace visit their retired professor (Orson Bean); Karen tries to prepare a home-cooked meal for Stan's birthday.

programme.desc: Will discovers that Grace is dating his boss; Rosario requests a divorce from Jack so that she can marry Karen's gardener.

programme.desc: Jack and Will (Sean Hayes, Eric McCormack) visit two old party buddies (guest stars Jerry Levine and Tim Bagley) and discover they are giving parenthood a try.

programme.desc: Grace finds it hard to call it quits with Ben; Jack livens up his failing cabaret act at Will's expense.

programme.desc: Grace rejects an ex-boyfriend's suggestion that she participate with him and his girlfriend in a romantic escapade; when she confides in Will and Karen, the conservative Grace considers throwing caution to the wind.

programme.desc: Will is terrified by revelations made to him by a fortuneteller; pop icon Cher encounters her biggest fan, Jack.

programme.title: Live: MLB Now

Host Brian Kenny discusses the issues and provides analysis, with a bent toward modern analytics to prove his points. The series also features interviews with personalities throughout the game, and viewer opinions are welcome as well via social media polls.

programme.title: Fackham Hall

programme.title: Game Night

But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Moonlight

programme.title: Ice on Fire

programme.title: Alien
programme.desc: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

programme.title: Aliens
programme.desc: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

programme.title: Alien 3
programme.desc: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

programme.title: Alien Resurrection
programme.desc: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

programme.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator

programme.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem

On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.
